intended_use: The GetSet GoLIF! Lumbar Interbody Fusion (IBF) system is indicated for interbody fusion with autograft and/or allogeneic bone graft comprised of cancellous and/or corticocancellous bone graft in pati
intended_use_full: The GetSet GoLIF! Lumbar Interbody Fusion (IBF) system is indicated for interbody fusion with autograft and/or allogeneic bone graft comprised of cancellous and/or corticocancellous bone graft in patients with symptomatic Degenerative Disc Disease (DDD) at either one or two contiguous levels in the lumbar spine, from L1-L2 to L5-S1. These DDD patients may also have up to Grade 1 Spondylolisthesis or retrolisthesis at the involved levels.
target_condition: Symptomatic Degenerative Disc Disease (DDD) of the lumbar spine, with or without Grade 1 Spondylolisthesis or retrolisthesis
other_metrics: Mechanical testing per ASTM F2077 (static and dynamic axial compression, static and dynamic compression shear), subsidence per ASTM F2267, expulsion testing; LAL testing per ANSI/AAMI ST72 (limit of 20 EU per device)
